message:
Fix e2e tests to handle multiple matching elements

- Use dialog-scoped locators for spotlight tests to avoid matching
  both page search and spotlight search inputs
- Use .first() for locators that may match multiple elements
  (copy buttons, ideation filter buttons, "Copied" text)
- Fix page title regex to match "Jeffrey's Prompts" correctly
- Add networkidle wait and explicit dialog visibility checks
- All 19 Playwright tests now passing on chromium

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
